name: ui-regression-pinner subagent file ships at agents/ui-regression-pinner.md with model sonnet and required prompt fields
command: head -40 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner.md" 2>err.txt > head.txt && grep -q '^name: ui-regression-pinner$' head.txt && grep -q 'model: sonnet' head.txt && grep -q 'prompt_id: ui-regression-pinner' head.txt && grep -q 'prompt_version:' head.txt && echo ok 1>&2
